I am Maísa. I am from São Paulo.
David is from Canada. He is our new partner.
We are colleagues. We are in finance.
Are you from São Paulo? Yes, I am.
Good morning! I am David, the new partner from Canada.
Good morning, David. Nice to meet you. My name is Maísa.
Nice to meet you too, Maísa. Do you work here?
Yes, I work in finance. I am on the finance team.
Great! We are colleagues, then. Is the office on this floor?
Yes, it is. The meeting room is next to the elevator.
Perfect. Are you from São Paulo?
Yes, I am. I am from São Paulo. It is a big city.
It is my first day at the company. See you at the meeting!
See you at the meeting, David. Have a great first day!
Good morning! I am Maísa. Nice to meet you.
I work in finance.
I am from São Paulo.
David is our new partner from Canada.
See you at the meeting!

Hi! My name is David. I am the new partner at the company. I am from Canada, but now I am here in Brazil. I work in finance, like you. I am very happy to be in Sao Paulo. It is a big and beautiful city. I am here for two weeks. I want to meet the team. It is nice to meet everyone. See you soon!

Good morning, everyone. My name is Sarah. I am the office manager. Welcome to the finance team. Our office is on the fifth floor. The meeting room is next to the elevator. The coffee is free in the kitchen. If you have a question, I am here to help. Have a great first day at work!
Hello! My name is Maisa. I am from Sao Paulo. I work in finance. It is nice to meet you.
Could you repeat that, please?
Could you speak more slowly, please?
How do you say this in English?
I need a moment to think.
Thank you for your patience.
